title: iru's Suspicious Stew Tweaks
body:
# What is this?

This resourcepack is visualizing the effects of Suspicious Stew!

![inventory view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38a9ae6cd34baf76fe722c6e39258f3beccc0e77.png)

# What is this?
This resource pack is visualize the movement of droppers and dispensers!

# How to use?
.zip file install in the resourcepacks folder! no requirement MOD!
